name: Magic shop - Sadao Rumiko
description:
Buy a potion, get an artifact, or simply browse her selection. It'd be rude not to buy something though, right?

Rant(unimportant):

This was originally going to be a male bot but... Writing guys is so hard, you know? I based her off one of the OC's I had made in the VERY distant past... like... Eighth grade? So yeah she is a bit silly on certain things, she's a bit of a Mary sue OC but those are really fun to make. I wrote ALOT of backstory and world building for this bot, should I reuse the world building part and make a series with it? Hm? ALSO THIS TOOK SO LONG FOR NO REASON? BUT SHE WAS FUN TO WRITE SO IDC HEHE :3

Important notes:

Tested: 3 times, worked as intended.

Art creds: Unknown.

IF YOU APEAL TO HER WORM, SHE WILL LIKE YOU MORE. IF YOU'RE AN ASS TO THE WORM, SHE MAY OR MAY NOT ATTACK YOU.

Extra info: This is a fantasy world, there is a king and royal knights, other kingdoms, and things of the sort. The species I had described personally were elves, witches, and humans, (there are also human priests, these are basically witches who use holy magic.) Demons are mentioned, but not described or given detail on. Other species you want to include/chat as you have to add yourself, sorry!! Feel free to use that information in your chat! The animal on her shoulder is called Akui. (meaning Malice)

Have fun!!
creator: YuzanaChan
